ж–ҮжЎЈеҸҠз»„д»¶еә“
nodeзүҲжң¬з®ЎзҗҶ
npmеёёз”Ёе‘Ҫд»Ө
йЎ№зӣ®з»ҹдёҖзүҲжң¬
npmй…ҚзҪ®й•ңеғҸжәҗ
npmжЁЎеқ—е®үиЈ…жңәеҲ¶
еҢ…з®ЎзҗҶе·Ҙе…·
еҸ‘еёғnpmеҢ…

зүҲжң¬жҺ§еҲ¶

JSдёӯзҡ„this

EcmaеӣҪйҷ…

HTTPзј“еӯҳ

еүҚз«ҜеҹӢзӮ№

зҪ‘з»ңиҜ·жұӮ

Web Workers

0.1+0.2 !==0.3 ?

eventдәӢд»¶еұһжҖ§

еӨ§еұҸе®һзҺ°ж–№жЎҲ

жөҸи§ҲеҷЁеӯҳеӮЁж–№ејҸ

javascriptеҫӘзҺҜж–№жі•

JavaScriptи®ҫи®ЎжЁЎејҸ

On this page

еүҚз«Ҝж°ҙеҚ° вҖӢ

и°ғз”Ёж°ҙеҚ°йЎөйқўпјҡ

<template>
  <Watermark text="зүҲжқғжүҖжңү">
    <div>е•Ҡе“Ҳе“Ҳе“Ҳе“Ҳе“Ҳе“Ҳе“Ҳе“Ҳ</div>
  </Watermark>
</template>

<script setup>
import Watermark from '@/components/Watermark.vue'
</script>

ж°ҙеҚ°з»„д»¶пјҡ

<template>
  <div class="watermark-container" ref="parentRef">
    <slot></slot>
  </div>
</template>

<script setup>
import { ref, watchEffect, onMounted, onUnmounted } from 'vue'

import useWatermarkBg from '../utils/useWatermarkBg'

const props = defineProps({
  text: {
    // дј е…Ҙж°ҙеҚ°зҡ„ж–Үжң¬
    type: String,
    required: true,
    default: 'watermark'
  },
  fontSize: {
    // еӯ—дҪ“зҡ„еӨ§е°Ҹ
    type: Number,
    default: 40,
    validator: (value) => {
      return value >= 10
    }
  },
  gap: {
    // ж°ҙеҚ°йҮҚеӨҚзҡ„й—ҙйҡ”
    type: Number,
    default: 20
  }
})
const bg = useWatermarkBg(props)
const parentRef = ref(null)
const flag = ref(0) // еЈ°жҳҺдёҖдёӘдҫқиө–
let div
watchEffect(() => {
  flag.value // е°Ҷдҫқиө–ж”ҫеңЁ watchEffect йҮҢ
  if (!parentRef.value) {
    return
  }
  if (div) {
    div.remove()
  }
  const { base64, styleSize } = bg.value
  div = document.createElement('div')
  div.style.backgroundImage = `url(${base64})`
  div.style.backgroundSize = `${styleSize}px ${styleSize}px`
  div.style.backgroundRepeat = 'repeat'
  div.style.zIndex = 9999
  div.style.position = 'absolute'
  div.style.inset = 0
  parentRef.value.appendChild(div)
})
let ob
onMounted(() => {
  ob = new MutationObserver((records) => {
    for (const record of records) {
      for (const dom of record.removedNodes) {
        if (dom === div) {
          flag.value++ // еҲ йҷӨиҠӮзӮ№зҡ„ж—¶еҖҷжӣҙж–°дҫқиө–
          return
        }
      }
      if (record.target === div) {
        flag.value++ // дҝ®ж”№еұһжҖ§зҡ„ж—¶еҖҷжӣҙж–°дҫқиө–
        return
      }
    }
  })
  ob.observe(parentRef.value, {
    childList: true,
    attributes: true,
    subtree: true
  })
})

onUnmounted(() => {
  ob && ob.disconnect()
  div = null
})
</script>

useWatermarkBg.js:

import { computed } from 'vue'

export default function useWatermarkBg(props) {
  return computed(() => {
    // еҲӣе»әдёҖдёӘ canvas
    const canvas = document.createElement('canvas')
    const devicePixelRatio = window.devicePixelRatio || 1
    // и®ҫзҪ®еӯ—дҪ“еӨ§е°Ҹ
    const fontSize = props.fontSize * devicePixelRatio
    const font = fontSize + 'px'
    const ctx = canvas.getContext('2d')
    // иҺ·еҸ–ж–Үеӯ—е®ҪеәҰ
    ctx.font = font
    const { width } = ctx.measureText(props.text)
    const canvasSize = Math.max(100, width) + props.gap * devicePixelRatio
    canvas.width = canvasSize
    canvas.height = canvasSize
    ctx.translate(canvas.width / 2, canvas.height / 2)
    // ж—ӢиҪ¬ 45 еәҰи®©ж–Үеӯ—еҸҳеҖҫж–ң
    ctx.rotate((Math.PI / 180) * -45)
    ctx.fillStyle = 'rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.3)'
    ctx.font = font
    ctx.textAlign = 'center'
    ctx.textBaseline = 'middle'
    // е°Ҷж–Үеӯ—з”»еҮәжқҘ
    ctx.fillText(props.text, 0, 0)
    return {
      base64: canvas.toDataURL(),
      size: canvasSize,
      styleSize: canvasSize / devicePixelRatio
    }
  })
}
Pager
дёҠдёҖйЎөзҪ‘з»ңиҜ·жұӮ
дёӢдёҖйЎөWeb Workers
